name: onebrain
description: Enterprise knowledge harvesting, repository documentation, cross-reference mapping, and OneBrain ingestion workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Harvest, document, cross-reference, and ingest enterprise knowledge.
interface.longDescription: OneBrain adds skills and tooling for explicit parallel-agent harvests across repositories, wikis, Azure DevOps, GitHub, Jira, and local source trees. It generates repository-level Markdown, coverage manifests, clue maps, cross-repository references, and OneBrain-ready memories with stable source refs.
defaultPrompt: Harvest these repos into complete OneBrain docs.
